BackstoryDef.title: MRE reviewer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was employed by [PAWN_possessive] government to be on the frontline of tasting new and exotic MREs before being mass produced for the space marines. [PAWN_pronoun] would eat common meals such as hash browns and pizza, to exotic tastes like gunpowder berry souffle and magma chip on toast. It was also [PAWN_nameDef]'s job to taste old and possibly expired MREs to see if they were still edible and safe to send to lower-priority warfronts.
